Brooklynn Holt is the mother of Shakeur, a 5 year old, who has been diagnosed with Level 3 autism, click to hear her story (video).
Click here to watch on YouTube
Call us at (833) 903-3972
If you have concerns about your child’s development and need support with screening, early intervention services, or connecting to community resources, Help Me Grow LA is here to assist you every step of the way.
Families and Caregivers
HMG LA’s Family Partners provides navigation support and tools to help your child thrive.
Providers
Child health care and other providers are part of the HMG LA network that guide families in their child’s developmental journey.
Self-Search
Resources
Search for resources and services in your local community.
About
Help Me Grow LA
Help Me Grow LA supports families with questions or concerns about their child’s development. Our Family Partners, all who have experience raising children with special needs, offer practical advice, information, and support so families can get help in their community.
Learn more about Help Me Grow LA
"Identifying developmental delays early in life can enhance a child's growth trajectory. It can also 
 help children with disabilities reach their full potential."
- Carlo DeAntonio, MD, North Los Angeles County Regional Center
